source_pr.title: ddl: Pass race
source_pr.body: pass race and rename reorgContext to mockContext.

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky under the race detector due to concurrent access to transaction state in a mock/test context without synchronization. This PR stabilizes it by introducing a mutex around GetTxn() in the mock context and using that thread-safe context in DDL tests.
fix_pattern: Add locking to mock/test contexts that manage transactions (e.g., guard GetTxn) to avoid data races under -race.
